chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.102 of 2018 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For direction 1. For orders on CMA No.859 /2025 2. For orders on CMA No.860/2025 3. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Wahab Baloch, advocate for appellant Mr. Aziz Ahmed Shar, advocate for respondent No.2 ---- Learned counsel for respondent No.2 has filed a statement, which is taken on record. Adjourned to 15.10.2025, meanwhile, the applicants shall not be dispossessed from the Shop Nos.119 and 120 till the next date of hearing and alleged contemnors shall also be present in person on the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
